title: Swordsman of Siena
writer: Anthony Marshall, Michael Kanin, Fay Kanin
actors: Stewart Granger, Sylva Koscina, Christine Kaufmann
plot: A Spanish overlord controls 16th-century Tuscany. He plans to marry into a prominent Italian family and hires an Englishman to serve as bodyguard for his less-than-eager fiancee. The bodyguard finds his allegiance switching to the...
